title: AutoTip
description: Automatically tip all players on Hypixel to gain coins & xp
body:
# AutoTip

Start automatically tipping players using network boosters on Hypixel to get some coins, and such without any manual action to be done.

## Functioning

Every 5 minutes, it sends `/tip all` to Hypixel. And that's it. No weird system that requires other players or whatever like other legacy mods did, it's really that simple.
